Graph using Adjacency Matrix with DFS.code: Initialize graph as 2D list. Add edges using append. Define DFS function. Call DFS on node 0. Print visited nodes. Graph = [[0]*5 for _ in range(5)] Graph[0][2] = 1 Graph[0][3] = 1 Graph[2][1] = 1 Graph[2][4] = 1 Graph[3][1] = 1 def dfs(node, visited): if node in visited: return visited.append(node) for i in range(len(Graph)): if Graph[node][i]: dfs(i, visited) visited = [] dfs(0, visited) print(visited)

Merge Sort implementation.code:
```python
def merge_sort(arr):
    if len(arr) > 1:
        mid = len(arr) // 2
        left_half = arr[:mid]
        right_half = arr[mid:]

        merge_sort(left_half)
        merge_sort(right_half)

        i = j = k = 0

        while i < len(left_half) and j < len(right_half):
            if left_half[i] < right_half[j]:
                arr[k] = left_half[i]
                i += 1
            else:
                arr[k] = right_half[j]
                j += 1
            k += 1

        while i < len(left_half):
            arr[k] = left_half[i]
            i += 1
            k += 1

        while j < len(right_half):
            arr[k] = right_half[j]
            j += 1
            k += 1```

LRU Cache using OrderedDict.code: import collections class LRUCache: def __init__(self, capacity): self.cache = collections.OrderedDict() self.capacity = capacity def get(self, key): if key not in self.cache: return -1 value = self.cache.pop(key) self.cache[key] = value return value def put(self, key, value): if key in self.cache: self.cache.pop(key) self.cache[key] = value else: if len(self.cache) == self.capacity: self.cache.popitem(last = False) self.cache[key] = value
